title: ⟁ Robot Creeper + [FA]
description: This is my first resource pack created with the aim of improving the appearance of the mob, please do not judge strictly.This resource pack presents my vision of the appearance of the creeper.
body:
This is my first resource pack created with the aim of improving the appearance of the mob, please do not judge strictly.This resource pack presents my vision of the appearance of the _creeper_.
